privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for solvespace_env rpi4_mechanical_profile task by confirming that the agent constructs a new 3D model from scratch without pre-existing data. Verified the expected output file path, dimensions for a standard Raspberry Pi 4 Model B board (85x56mm), and mounting hole constraints against task instructions, verifier logic, and official RPi mechanical specifications.
